text.title: ArgoCD GitOps Output Contract
text.summary: JSON Schema (draft-07) for the ArgoCD GitOps config bundle artefact plus valid / invalid / forbidden examples.

section.title: Schema

example.title: ArgoCD config for production EU cluster
Branches + manual apps
example.note: Multiple forbidden patterns triggered; reject and re-request.

text.reference: Validator script that enforces this contract.
